headline: Coke Keeps Beating Pepsi. Warren Buffett’s Bet Has Paid Off.
summary: New Berkshire CEO Greg Abel has called Coke one of its “core four” investments, along with Apple, Moody’s, and American Express. It’s beating the S&P 500 this year.
